---
title: "Home"
body-class: homepage
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.homepage-hero-section}

::: {.homepage-tagline-card}
::: {.homepage-tagline}
[Clarity]{.homepage-tagline-em} at every stage of your [data journey]{.homepage-tagline-em}
:::
:::

::: {.homepage-intro-row}
::: {.homepage-hero-content}
![](assets/homepage_portrait.jpg){.homepage-hero-photo}

::: {.homepage-hero-text}
Hello!👋 I’m Kevin - a data, spatial and research professional with experience across government and academic environments. I help teams work confidently with complex population, demographic and administrative data, supporting every stage of the data journey from design, collection and governance to analysis, interpretation and communication. My work brings together rigorous methods and feasible decision support, and I focus on helping organizations understand the systems they operate within so they can move forward with clarity and confidence.


:::
:::

::: {.homepage-cred}
::: {.homepage-cred-item}
**How I Work**

- Clarity and transparency at every step
- Rigorous methods with practical outcomes
- Strong documentation and reproducible workflows
- Collaborative, stakeholder-aligned approach
- Ethical and governance‑minded practice

:::

:::
:::

:::

::: {.homepage-focus}


::: {.homepage-pillars}
::: {.homepage-pillar}
::: {.homepage-pillar-index}
01
:::
**Understanding systems through data**  
Using spatial and non‑spatial population, demographic and administrative data to reveal patterns, relationships and system‑level dynamics.
:::

::: {.homepage-pillar}
::: {.homepage-pillar-index}
02
:::
**Designing research and analytical approaches**  
Building the right questions, methods and workflows to make sense of complex problems, whether the data is messy, incomplete or drawn from multiple sources.
:::

::: {.homepage-pillar}
::: {.homepage-pillar-index}
03
:::
**Turning insight into action**  
Translating complex findings into clear guidance, decision support and feasible recommendations that help teams move forward with confidence.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.homepage-explore}
::: {.homepage-explore-inner}
### Explore my work {.homepage-explore-title}

Projects in analytical design, automation and data-driven problem solving across domains

[Browse projects](projects/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .homepage-explore-btn}
:::
:::
